channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Congress has taken on Epstein. But lawmakers and survivors are still searching for accountability
item.description: Public demand and the increasingly outspoken calls from the survivors of Jeffrey Epstein’s sexual abuse have driven Congress to mostly set aside party politics in an effort to search for accountability.

item.title: Trump vents about judge who blocked the Kennedy Center renovation and fumes over his legal setbacks
How a chemical tank disaster struck at the heart of a Washington state mill town
